message:
fix: match gate inputs per-step in transaction prepare phase evaluation

Replace global all-ready check with per-step gate input matching.
Previously, evaluate_prepare_phase() checked whether all gate inputs
were ready as a flat list and deferred if the count was less than
the step count. This missed cases where one step had multiple gate
inputs while another step had none.

Now iterates through plan steps, filters gate inputs by step_id,
and defers immediately if any step has zero matching gate inputs.
This correctly handles plans where some steps have been evaluated
and others are still pending.

Tests: tx_prepare_phase_defers_when_any_plan_step_lacks_gate_input

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
